title: Accurate Maps
description: A small quality of life mod that changes the vanilla map colouring to be more accurate to in-game colors.
body: # Accurate Maps A small quality of life mod that changes the vanilla map coloring to be more accurate to in-game colors. ## Showcase Accurate Maps works by sending extra info to the client about the block being represented in the map. With that extra info, the client can then calculate the color of the block in a more accurate way. If the map being rendered does not have additional info, the renderer will fall back to the vanilla colors, so mods that use the vanilla map system to render custom stuff will not be affected. ## Resource Pack Support Since we're sampling the color directly from the block texture instead of a predefined list of colors, resource packs are fully supported. ## Other information For bug reporting please proceed to the mod's GitHub repository: [https://github.com/lucaargolo/accurate-maps](https://github.com/lucaargolo/accurate-maps) If you have any other questions or suggestions, feel free to call me on Discord @D4rk#0693 You can find me in the Cafeteria Development guild. [![](https://discordapp.com/api/guilds/707435077679841350/embed.png?style=banner2&v=2)](https://discord.com/invite/G4PjhEf)
